title: Board level notes - not linked to an individual  item
excerpt:

posts.author: Calgat (Clare Taggart)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be really useful to be able to make board level notes. Not against individual items. At present there is the (i) next to the board Title. But not really designed for ongoing board notes.

For example - You may want to keep a list of key changes to how to use that board. so that staff can be aware of any change of processes etc.

It would be a bonus if you could time and user stamp any notes made and posiible notify anyone included in a new note.

I am not aware that this is an available feature or available via an app etc.

Anyone else find this a usual feature please vote above!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Clare!

I am excited to let you know that we have a feature like this in the works, New feature in development: Board discussions!

Stay tuned for further updates in the near future!
